title: Rich Italian Pork Tagliatelle
description: A fatty and molten Italian dish featuring breadcrumbs and served on a hot stone plate, perfect for a brunch mood. This dish combines the richness of pork with the comfort of tagliatelle.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the tagliatelle according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the garlic until fragrant.
Add the ground pork to the skillet, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until it is no longer pink.
Stir in the breadcrumbs and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Combine the cooked tagliatelle, pork mixture, and parmesan cheese in a large bowl and toss to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the tagliatelle mixture to a hot stone plate and top with chopped parsley.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F, then rest 3 minutes before serving.
